common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to get Shop level CPC ads multiple-days daily performance.

request_params.description: This is the parameter to indicate the start date of the time length of performance.
request_params.name: start_date

request_params.description: This is the parameter to indicate the end date of the time length of performance
request_params.name: end_date

response_params.description: Error code, empty when no error returned
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: If some data cannot respond normally, set the warning
response_params.name: warning

response_params.description: request id is unique for each request
response_params.name: request_id

children.description: This is the parameter to indicate which date the performance record belongs to.
children.name: date

children.description: Total number of clicks on the Ad
children.name: clicks

children.description: Ctr, click-through rate measures how often shoppers who see an ad end up clicking it. CTR = Clicks / Impressions
children.name: ctr

children.description:
Buyer place an order within 7 days after clicking on the ads (item gets purchased from the clicked ads)

Please kindly note that the direct_order in the API reflected to Seller Center - Shopee Ads Module FE is Direct Conversions.
children.name: direct_order

children.description:
Buyer place an order within 7 days after clicking on the ads; (the item gets purchased as long as there are other items from the same shops got click.)

Please kindly note that the broad_order in the API reflected to Seller Center - Shopee Ads Module FE is Conversions.
children.name: broad_order

children.description:
Ad orders / total number of clicks on the Ad. (item gets purchased from the clicked ads.)

Please kindly note that the direct_conversions in the API reflected to Seller Center - Shopee Ads Module FE is Direct Conversions Rate.
children.name: direct_conversions

children.description:
Ad orders / total number of clicks on the Ad. (the item gets purchased as long as there are other items from the same shops got click.)

Please kindly note that the broad_conversions in the API reflected to Seller Center - Shopee Ads Module FE is Conversions Rate.
children.name: broad_conversions

children.description: item sold within 7 days after clicking on the ads. (item gets purchased from the clicked ads.)
children.name: direct_item_sold

children.description:
item sold within 7 days after clicking on the ads.(the item gets purchased as long as there are other items from the same shops got click.)

Please kindly note that the broad_conversions in the API reflected to Advertiser Platform is Conversion Rate.
children.name: broad_item_sold

children.description: Total sales generated from Ad over a certain time frame Typically 7 days. (item gets purchased from the clicked ads.)
children.name: direct_gmv

children.description: Total sales generated from Ad over a certain time frame (the item gets purchased as long as there are other items from the same shops got click.)
children.name: broad_gmv

children.description: (Cost Per Conversion) Ad's average cost per sales conversion
children.name: cost_per_conversion

children.description: Ad GMV/Ad Expenditure. (item gets purchased from the clicked ads.)
children.name: direct_roas

children.description: Ad GMV/Ad Expenditure. (the item gets purchased as long as there are other items from the same shops got click.)
children.name: broad_roas

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://open.admin.uat.shopee.io/api/v2/ads/get_all_cpc_ads_daily_performance?access_token=access_token&end_date=18-03-2021&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=12312&sign=sign&start_date=17-03-2021&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
